parameters.query:
SELECT a.id, a.company_name, a.job_title, a.pipeline_track, a.current_state,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - a.state_changed_at)) / 86400 AS days_in_state,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - a.applied_at)) / 86400 AS days_since_applied,
       a.follow_up_count,
       a.last_follow_up_at,
       a.follow_up_snoozed_until,
       a.applied_at,
       a.state_changed_at,
       a.reference_number
FROM applications a
WHERE a.is_active = true
  AND a.current_state IN ('applied', 'acknowledged', 'screening', 'interviewing', 'academic_longlisted', 'academic_shortlisted')
  AND (a.follow_up_snoozed_until IS NULL OR a.follow_up_snoozed_until < NOW())
ORDER BY a.state_changed_at ASC;

INSERT INTO follow_up_log (application_id, reminder_type, suggested_action, follow_up_template, sent_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.reminderType }}', '{{ $json.suggestedAction }}', '{{ $json.template }}', NOW());

UPDATE applications SET
    follow_up_count = follow_up_count + 1,
    last_follow_up_at = NOW(),
    next_follow_up_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';

INSERT INTO notification_queue (application_id, notification_type, priority, subject, body_html, body_text)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.id }}',
    'follow_up_reminder',
    'high',
    '{{ $json.subject }}',
    '{{ $json.bodyHtml }}',
    '{{ $json.suggestedAction }}'
);

SELECT transition_application_state(
    '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid,
    'ghosted',
    'ghosting_detected',
    'wf4_ghost',
    '{"days_waited": {{ $json.daysInState }}, "follow_ups_sent": {{ $json.follow_up_count }}}'::jsonb,
    'Automatically detected as ghosted after {{ $json.daysInState }} days with no response'
);

INSERT INTO notification_queue (application_id, notification_type, priority, subject, body_html, body_text) VALUES ( '{{ $json.id }}', 'ghosting_detected', 'medium', 'Ghosted: {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}', '

Application Marked as Ghosted

{{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}

After {{ $json.daysInState }} days with no response and {{ $json.follow_up_count }} follow-up(s) sent, this application has been automatically marked as ghosted.

Pipeline track: {{ $json.pipeline_track }}

', 'Application to {{ $json.company_name }} for {{ $json.job_title }} marked as ghosted after {{ $json.daysInState }} days.' );

SELECT a.id, a.company_name, a.job_title, a.current_state, j.expires_at,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (j.expires_at - NOW())) / 3600 AS hours_until_deadline
FROM applications a
JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id
WHERE a.current_state IN ('discovered', 'shortlisted', 'cv_tailored')
  AND j.expires_at BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '48 hours'
  AND j.expires_at > NOW();

INSERT INTO notification_queue (application_id, notification_type, priority, subject, body_html, body_text)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.id }}',
    'deadline_approaching',
    'critical',
    '{{ $json.subject }}',
    '{{ $json.bodyHtml }}',
    'Deadline for {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }} in {{ $json.hours_remaining }} hours.'
);
